title: TheHider
description: adds the Hider to your world can you survive (BETA)
body:
In the square, sunlit world of Minecraft, there is a legend whispered among builders and miners: the Hider. You never see it clearly at first. It is a shadow behind a tree, a block that feels out of place, a footstep that stops when you turn around. While you mine diamonds or raise a wooden house, the Hider is already watching, memorizing your patterns, counting your torches.

At night, when the sky fills with pixelated stars, the stalking begins. Chests open by themselves. Doors are left ajar. Your bed feels unsafe, even though no mobs are nearby. You tell yourself it is just lag, just imagination, but the silence grows heavier each evening. The Hider does not rush. It enjoys patience more than power.

As days pass, you notice signs carved into stone, messages made of blocks spelling your name. Wherever you run, the world feels smaller, as if the map itself is closing in. When the final moment comes, there is no dramatic battle music, only calm. The Hider steps out from behind a wall you placed yourself. One strike, swift and final, and your character falls. The world remains, peaceful and bright, as if nothing ever happened.
